title: ByteDance Releases Seed3D 2.0, 3D Generation Goes Production-Ready
summary: ByteDance launched Seed3D 2.0 on April 23, 2026, a new generation 3D generation model that achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results in geometry and texture quality, with a human evaluation preference rate over 69% compared to mainstream models. This marks a significant step from demo-level 3D generation to production-ready assets, potentially accelerating the adoption of AI-generated 3D content in gaming, robotics, and simulation industries. Seed3D 2.0 also supports part-level generation and scene composition, outputting assets with complete joint information compatible with standard formats like URDF and physics simulation engines like NVIDIA Isaac Sim.
context: 3D generation models aim to create 3D models from text or images. Previous models often produced low-quality geometry or textures, limiting their use to prototypes or visualizations. URDF is a standard XML format for robot models, and Isaac Sim is a robotics simulation platform from NVIDIA.
